description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front yard is landscaped with a large lawn, a paved driveway, and several trees and shrubs, leading up to a central entrance. The building facade is composed of white and blue panels, with large windows providing ample natural light. A detached garage is located at the rear of the property, accessible via the driveway. The backyard is enclosed and includes additional green space, with privacy provided by a wooden fence and strategically placed trees. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor areas and a streamlined, contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and blue paneling, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards within a fenced lot. Features include a central entrance, detached rear garage, and geometric, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, large front lawn, and two prominent trees flanking the path.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the lot, the detached garage at the rear, and the fenced backyard with additional greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the garage, backyard, and the back facade of the bungalow with visible windows and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended driveway, side lawn, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
